tasks.title: Remove installed skill copies from user home
VERIFY: Phase 0 — Cleanup
tasks.notes: Completed in ad2463c. Phase 0 APPROVED by PM. All 186 existing tests pass. Branch: feat/tui.

tasks.title: Add Ink dependencies and JSX support
tasks.notes: Completed in 3ffe0e2. Added ink ^5.0.1, react ^18.3.1, tsx ^4.19.3 to package.json. Updated bin/plug.js to register tsx/esm/api loader before dynamic import of src/index.js. Added no-arg TUI launch (process.argv.length <= 2) and 'plug tui' subcommand in src/index.js. Verified: node bin/plug.js renders 'PlugVault' tab bar; node bin/plug.js --help shows all commands including 'tui'; 186/186 tests pass. Note: ink-use-input does not exist as a separate npm package — useInput is built into Ink 5.x.

tasks.title: Create tab-bar and app shell
tasks.notes: Completed in 3ffe0e2. Created src/tui/app.jsx (activeTab state, left/right arrow switching, Esc to exit), src/tui/components/tab-bar.jsx (3 tabs: Discover/Installed/Vaults, active tab bold+underlined with bracket highlight), src/tui/components/hotkey-bar.jsx (context-sensitive key hints per tab). App renders with border box layout. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create package-list and package-item components
tasks.notes: Completed in 3ffe0e2. Created src/tui/components/package-item.jsx (2-line row: checkbox + cursor + name/vault/version + type badge on line 1, description on line 2, truncated to terminal width). Created src/tui/components/package-list.jsx (viewport windowing with row-height awareness, up/down cursor, scroll indicators, Space to toggle, Enter callback, isActive guard). Verified rendering with mock data. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — TUI Foundation
tasks.notes: Completed in 7ce898b. Phase 1 APPROVED by PM (commit 7ce898b). 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create use-packages hook, stdout wrapper, and Discover screen
tasks.notes: Completed in 912d201. Created: src/tui/utils/capture-stdout.js (stdout/stderr interceptor for runInstall), src/tui/hooks/use-packages.js (fetches from all vaults via getResolveOrder+fetchRegistry), src/tui/screens/discover.jsx (full list/detail/installing/complete state machine), src/tui/components/status-line.jsx, src/tui/components/spinner.jsx. Extracted scoreMatch to src/utils/search-scoring.js. Updated app.jsx to render DiscoverScreen with input locking. Updated PackageList with external toggled+onToggle+onCursorChange props and installedNames. Updated PackageItem with isInstalled checkmark. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create search-box with live filtering
tasks.notes: Completed in 912d201. Created src/tui/components/search-box.jsx (activated by '/', captures keystrokes, Esc unfocuses+clears), src/tui/hooks/use-search.js (useMemo filter using scoreMatch). Wired into Discover screen. Action key 'i' only fires when search unfocused. Status line shows filtered count. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create package-detail panel, install action, and progress screens
tasks.notes: Completed in 912d201. Created src/tui/components/package-detail.jsx (full detail view, shows name/desc/type/version/vault/tags/path/install-to path, [i] install action, Esc back), src/tui/components/install-progress.jsx (per-package spinner/checkmark/X progress), src/tui/components/install-complete.jsx (summary with paths and usage hints, any key returns). Install uses captureOutput+ctx.json=true to parse path from runInstall JSON output. Batch install via toggled Space items. Single install via cursor when none toggled. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — Discover Screen
tasks.notes: Completed in 455590c. Phase 2 APPROVED by PM (commit 455590c). 186/186 tests pass. 1 FAIL finding: progress.json tracking hygiene (all tasks marked pending instead of completed) — fixed in Phase 3 commit.

tasks.title: Create Installed screen with update/remove
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 3 commit. Created src/tui/hooks/use-installed.js (reads both scopes, background update-check via findPackage+compareSemver), src/tui/screens/installed.jsx (list/detail/confirm-remove/operating/result state machine, scope badge, type badge, version+update indicator on line 1, file path on line 2, InstalledStatusLine with update count, u=update r=remove with confirmation). Updated package-item.jsx with mode prop (discover|installed), package-list.jsx with mode+emptyMessage props. 186/186 tests pass.

tasks.title: Create Vaults screen with sync and add form
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 3 commit. Created src/tui/hooks/use-vaults.js (reads getConfig(), enriches with packageCount from cache, isDefault, githubUrl), src/tui/screens/vaults.jsx (VaultList+VaultItem 2-line rows with ★ default indicator and GitHub URL on line 2, AddVaultForm sequential inline prompts name→url→branch→private, ConfirmRemoveVault with official-vault guard, sync per-vault progress, OperationResult). Updated app.jsx to render InstalledScreen+VaultsScreen. 186/186 tests pass.
